tweets.text:
“Graphic Design” = visual communication
“Brand Design” = identity creation
“Visual Design” = digital interface aesthetics
“Product Design” = UX/UI + product experience
“Creative Design” = vague umbrella term (use ‘Art Director’ or ‘Multidisciplinary Designer’ instead)

“Visual ≠
tweets.author: zazzygfx

tweets.text:
💥 16 little UI design rules that make a big impact

UI design might appear to be a magical art form, but a lot of it is made up from logical rules or guidelines. 

We’ll redesign an example interface using 16 of 100+ guidelines from my book - @PracticalUI

tweets.text:
The component audit widget is live! 

It scans your Figma library, then:

– Shows components by page
– Shows components missing variables/styles
– Lists components without descriptions
– Lists components without links
– Print a summary frame for a log
